name: io.github.shin1219-eng/browser-proof
description: Agentic browser verification system for A2A proofing.

tools.name: verify_claim
tools.description: Verify a claim on a public webpage and return text evidence and a screenshot.

tools.name: get_run
tools.description: Get details of a specific verification run.

tools.name: get_run_screenshot
tools.description: Get the screenshot URL for a specific verification run.
